title: Tension Excalates in Manipur as UNC Shutdown Triggers Naga-Kuki Clashes in Chagoubung
description: Reports suggest that as the Naga youth were enforcing the shutdown in the area, the members of Kuki community who were trying to clear the road, confronted them. As the tensions escalated, the situation descended into complete chaos eventually leading to physical altercations and finally gunfire.
